mapper.select: WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoints_timed - LAG(checkpoints_timed) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoints_timed ELSE checkpoints_timed - LAG(checkpoints_timed) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoints_timed ) AS delta_timed, COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoints_req - LAG(checkpoints_req) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoints_req ELSE checkpoints_req - LAG(checkpoints_req) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoints_req ) AS delta_req FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 2 ) SELECT CASE WHEN (SUM(delta_timed) + SUM(delta_req)) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(delta_req) / (SUM(delta_timed) + SUM(delta_req)), 2) ELSE 0.0 END AS value, COALESCE(SUM(delta_req), 0) AS requestedCount, COALESCE(SUM(delta_timed), 0) AS timedCount FROM checkpoint_delta
mapper.sql: WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, wal_bytes, buffers_checkpoint, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoint_write_time - LAG(checkpoint_write_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoint_write_time ELSE checkpoint_write_time - LAG(checkpoint_write_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoint_write_time ) AS delta_write_time, COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoint_sync_time - LAG(checkpoint_sync_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoint_sync_time ELSE checkpoint_sync_time - LAG(checkpoint_sync_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoint_sync_time ) AS delta_sync_time, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wal_bytes - LAG(wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN wal_bytes ELSE wal_bytes - LAG(wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, wal_bytes ) AS delta_wal_bytes, COALESCE( CASE WHEN buffers_checkpoint - LAG(buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN buffers_checkpoint ELSE buffers_checkpoint - LAG(buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, buffers_checkpoint ) AS delta_buffers_checkpoint, COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoints_timed - LAG(checkpoints_timed) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoints_timed ELSE checkpoints_timed - LAG(checkpoints_timed) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoints_timed ) AS delta_checkpoints_timed, COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoints_req - LAG(checkpoints_req) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoints_req ELSE checkpoints_req - LAG(checkpoints_req) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoints_req ) AS delta_checkpoints_req FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_write_time)::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS avg_write_time FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} AND (avg_write_time > 0 OR avg_sync_time > 0) GROUP BY collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_checkpoints_req, total_checkpoints_timed, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_checkpoints_req - LAG(total_checkpoints_req) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_checkpoints_req ELSE total_checkpoints_req - LAG(total_checkpoints_req) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_checkpoints_req ) AS delta_checkpoints_req, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_checkpoints_timed - LAG(total_checkpoints_timed) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_checkpoints_timed ELSE total_checkpoints_timed - LAG(total_checkpoints_timed) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_checkpoints_timed ) AS delta_checkpoints_timed FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(delta_checkpoints_req, 0) AS requested, COALESCE(delta_checkpoints_timed, 0) AS timed FROM checkpoint_delta ORDER BY collected_at

WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_wal_bytes, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_wal_bytes - LAG(total_wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_wal_bytes ELSE total_wal_bytes - LAG(total_wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_wal_bytes ) AS delta_wal_bytes FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(delta_wal_bytes, 0) AS wal_bytes FROM checkpoint_delta ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_sync_time)::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS sync_time, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_write_time)::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS write_time FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} AND (avg_write_time > 0 OR avg_sync_time > 0) GROUP BY collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_buffers_checkpoint, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_checkpoint - LAG(total_buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_checkpoint ELSE total_buffers_checkpoint - LAG(total_buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_checkpoint ) AS delta_buffers_checkpoint FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(ROUND((delta_buffers_checkpoint / 60.0)::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS buffers_per_sec FROM checkpoint_delta ORDER BY collected_at

WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, wal_bytes, buffers_checkpoint, COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoint_write_time - LAG(checkpoint_write_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoint_write_time ELSE checkpoint_write_time - LAG(checkpoint_write_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoint_write_time ) AS delta_write_time, COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoint_sync_time - LAG(checkpoint_sync_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoint_sync_time ELSE checkpoint_sync_time - LAG(checkpoint_sync_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoint_sync_time ) AS delta_sync_time, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wal_bytes - LAG(wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN wal_bytes ELSE wal_bytes - LAG(wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, wal_bytes ) AS delta_wal_bytes, COALESCE( CASE WHEN buffers_checkpoint - LAG(buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN buffers_checkpoint ELSE buffers_checkpoint - LAG(buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, buffers_checkpoint ) AS delta_buffers_checkpoint FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '24 hours' ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(delta_buffers_checkpoint), 0) AS buffersWritten, COALESCE(AVG((delta_write_time + delta_sync_time) / 1000.0), 0.0) AS avgTotalProcessTime, COALESCE(AVG(delta_wal_bytes / 1048576.0), 0.0) AS checkpointDistance, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(collected_at) - MIN(collected_at))) / 60.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) - 1, 0) ELSE 0.0 END AS checkpointInterval, CASE WHEN AVG((delta_write_time + delta_sync_time) / 1000.0) > 0 THEN AVG(delta_wal_bytes / NULLIF((delta_write_time + delta_sync_time) / 1000.0, 0) / 1048576.0) ELSE 0.0 END AS avgWalGenerationSpeed FROM checkpoint_delta

WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_buffers_checkpoint, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, total_wal_bytes, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_checkpoint - LAG(total_buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_checkpoint ELSE total_buffers_checkpoint - LAG(total_buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_checkpoint ) AS delta_buffers_checkpoint, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_wal_bytes - LAG(total_wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_wal_bytes ELSE total_wal_bytes - LAG(total_wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_wal_bytes ) AS delta_wal_bytes FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(delta_buffers_checkpoint), 0) AS buffersWritten, COALESCE(AVG(avg_write_time + avg_sync_time), 0.0) AS avgTotalProcessTime, COALESCE(AVG(delta_wal_bytes / 1048576.0), 0.0) AS checkpointDistance, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(collected_at) - MIN(collected_at))) / 60.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) - 1, 0) ELSE 0.0 END AS checkpointInterval, CASE WHEN AVG(avg_write_time + avg_sync_time) > 0 THEN AVG(delta_wal_bytes / NULLIF(avg_write_time + avg_sync_time, 0) / 1048576.0) ELSE 0.0 END AS avgWalGenerationSpeed FROM checkpoint_delta

WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT total_checkpoints_req, total_checkpoints_timed, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_checkpoints_req - LAG(total_checkpoints_req) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_checkpoints_req ELSE total_checkpoints_req - LAG(total_checkpoints_req) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_checkpoints_req ) AS delta_checkpoints_req, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_checkpoints_timed - LAG(total_checkpoints_timed) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_checkpoints_timed ELSE total_checkpoints_timed - LAG(total_checkpoints_timed) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_checkpoints_timed ) AS delta_checkpoints_timed FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(delta_checkpoints_req), 0) AS requestedTotal, COALESCE(SUM(delta_checkpoints_timed), 0) AS timedTotal FROM checkpoint_delta

WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT total_wal_bytes, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_wal_bytes - LAG(total_wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_wal_bytes ELSE total_wal_bytes - LAG(total_wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_wal_bytes ) AS delta_wal_bytes FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(delta_wal_bytes), 0) AS total, COALESCE(AVG(delta_wal_bytes), 0.0) AS average, COALESCE(MAX(delta_wal_bytes), 0) AS max FROM checkpoint_delta

WITH checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT total_buffers_checkpoint, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_checkpoint - LAG(total_buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_checkpoint ELSE total_buffers_checkpoint - LAG(total_buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_checkpoint ) AS delta_buffers_checkpoint FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT COALESCE(AVG(delta_buffers_checkpoint / 60.0), 0.0) AS average, COALESCE(MAX(delta_buffers_checkpoint / 60.0), 0.0) AS max, COALESCE(MIN(delta_buffers_checkpoint / 60.0), 0.0) AS min FROM checkpoint_delta

WITH checkpoint_with_delta AS ( SELECT checkpoint_raw_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, wal_bytes, wal_files_added, wal_files_removed, checkpoint_distance, buffers_checkpoint, buffers_backend, avg_buffers_per_sec, -- 이전 행과 비교하여 증분 계산 COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoint_write_time - LAG(checkpoint_write_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoint_write_time -- stats_reset 발생 시 현재 값 사용 ELSE checkpoint_write_time - LAG(checkpoint_write_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoint_write_time -- 첫 번째 행은 현재 값 사용 ) AS delta_write_time, COALESCE( CASE WHEN checkpoint_sync_time - LAG(checkpoint_sync_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN checkpoint_sync_time ELSE checkpoint_sync_time - LAG(checkpoint_sync_time) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, checkpoint_sync_time ) AS delta_sync_time, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wal_bytes - LAG(wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN wal_bytes ELSE wal_bytes - LAG(wal_bytes) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, wal_bytes ) AS delta_wal_bytes, COALESCE( CASE WHEN buffers_checkpoint - LAG(buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN buffers_checkpoint ELSE buffers_checkpoint - LAG(buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, buffers_checkpoint ) AS delta_buffers_checkpoint FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT checkpoint_raw_id AS id, TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS timestamp, checkpoint_type AS type, CONCAT(ROUND(checkpoint_distance / 1048576.0, 2), ' MB') AS checkpointDistance, COALESCE(ROUND((delta_write_time / 1000.0)::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS writeTime, COALESCE(ROUND((delta_sync_time / 1000.0)::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS syncTime, COALESCE(ROUND(((delta_write_time + delta_sync_time) / 1000.0)::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS totalTime, CONCAT(ROUND(delta_wal_bytes / 1048576.0, 2), ' MB') AS walGenerated, COALESCE(wal_files_added, 0) AS walFilesAdded, COALESCE(wal_files_removed, 0) AS walFilesRemoved, COALESCE(delta_buffers_checkpoint, 0) AS buffersWritten, COALESCE(buffers_backend, 0) AS buffersBackend, COALESCE(avg_buffers_per_sec, 0.0) AS avgBuffersPerSec, CASE WHEN (delta_write_time + delta_sync_time) / 1000.0 > 30 THEN '위험' WHEN (delta_write_time + delta_sync_time) / 1000.0 > 15 THEN '주의' ELSE '정상' END AS status FROM checkpoint_with_delta
WHERE CASE WHEN (delta_write_time + delta_sync_time) / 1000.0 > 30 THEN '위험' WHEN (delta_write_time + delta_sync_time) / 1000.0 > 15 THEN '주의' ELSE '정상' END IN
#{status}
ORDER BY collected_at DESC
SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id

SELECT checkpoint_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes, created_at, wal_files_added, wal_files_removed, checkpoint_distance, buffers_backend, avg_buffers_per_sec FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkpoint_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, checkpoint_type, checkpoints_timed, checkpoints_req, checkpoint_write_time, checkpoint_sync_time, buffers_checkpoint, wal_bytes, wal_files_added, wal_files_removed, checkpoint_distance, buffers_backend, avg_buffers_per_sec, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{checkpointType}, #{checkpointsTimed}, #{checkpointsReq}, #{checkpointWriteTime}, #{checkpointSyncTime}, #{buffersCheckpoint}, #{walBytes}, #{walFilesAdded}, #{walFilesRemoved}, #{checkpointDistance}, #{buffersBackend}, #{avgBuffersPerSec}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO checkpoint_agg_1m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgCheckpointReqRatio}, #{avgWriteTime}, #{avgSyncTime}, #{avgTotalTime}, #{totalCheckpointsTimed}, #{totalCheckpointsReq}, #{totalWalBytes}, #{totalBuffersCheckpoint}, #{status}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO checkpoint_agg_5m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgCheckpointReqRatio}, #{avgWriteTime}, #{avgSyncTime}, #{avgTotalTime}, #{totalCheckpointsTimed}, #{totalCheckpointsReq}, #{totalWalBytes}, #{totalBuffersCheckpoint}, #{status}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT checkpoint_agg_id, instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at < #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at
